channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Le panneau de contrôle domotique Echo Hub d’Amazon est à moitié prix pendant le Prime Day, le top pour piloter votre maison
item.description: L'Amazon Echo Hub est un écran tactile de 8 pouces avec tous vos objets connectés pour faciliter la gestion de la domotique, à retrouver pour 99,99 euros au lieu de 199,99 euros pendant le Prime Day.

item.title: Apple et Tesla victimes d’une fuite massive : leurs secrets de fabrication sur le dark web
item.description: Un sous-traitant indien d'Apple et de Tesla s'est fait voler 630 Go de documents, aujourd'hui publiés sur le dark web. Dedans : des normes de fabrication d'iPhone et des plans liés à la Model 3 et la Model Y.

item.title: Amazon ordered to bargain with Teamsters in case that could set back union progress
item.description: Amazon violated federal law when it refused to recognize a union, a judge ruled.

item.title: C’est officiel, le Nothing Phone (4b) sera présenté début juillet
item.description: Nothing dévoile la date de présentation du Phone (4b) qui inaugurera une toute nouvelle gamme de smartphones chez le constructeur.

item.title: On a trouvé l’un des meilleurs claviers mécaniques 75% du moment en forte promotion [Sponso]
item.description: Le Corsair K65 Plus Wireless, clavier mécanique sous format compact de référence, s'affiche en forte promotion. Amazon réduit son tarif à 109,99 euros au lieu de 169,99 euros.

item.title: Best Prime Day Fitness Tech Deals (2026)
item.description: I've compiled a list of the best fitness tech deals this Amazon Prime Day, including smartwatches, walking pads, and recovery gear. You can thank me later.

item.title: Panique chez Waymo : les taxis autonomes ne savent plus faire la différence entre une route et un chantier
item.description: Waymo lance un rappel sur sa flotte de 4 000 robotaxis pour les empêcher de pénétrer dans les zones de travaux sur autoroute. Les véhicules n’auront plus le droit de circuler sur les voies rapides, le temps qu’un correctif soit trouvé.

item.title: Prime Day Knocked Hundreds Off Our Top Pool-Cleaning Robots (2026)
item.description: Summer is for relaxing, not cleaning. Upgrade your backyard setup with a robot that cleans your pool for you.

item.title: Grâce au Prime Day, le Sony Inzone H5 passe sous les 100 euros
item.description: Même s'il est sorti il y a trois ans, le Sony Inzone H5 n'est pas obsolète et Amazon le remet sur le devant de la scène durant le Prime Day avec une remise de 34 %.

item.title: I'm making my fellow commuters jealous with the Shark ChillPill personal fan this week — and you can get your own for 20% off over Prime Day
item.description: Stuck on a bus? Train air conditioning broken? With this little fan, you'll stay cool and comfortable no matter what your commute throws at you.

item.title: The Best Amazon Prime Day Headphone Deals (2026)
item.description: From AirPods to on-ears, we’ve tested hundreds of pairs of headphones. Here are the best deals from Amazon’s biggest sale event.

item.title: Best Prime Day Smart Bird Feeder Deals (2026)
item.description: These camera-equipped feeders will introduce you to birds you never knew were visiting, and many WIRED favorites are on sale for Prime Day.

item.title: Recharger sa voiture électrique chez Ionity va coûter (un peu) plus cher en France : voici les nouveaux tarifs
item.description: L’opérateur de bornes de charge Ionity vient d’annoncer une hausse de ses prix en Europe. Mais rassurez-vous, les conducteurs de voitures électriques en France ne sont pas les plus touchés.

item.title: iOS 27 améliorera les échanges de messages entre iPhone et Android
item.description: La seconde bêta d’iOS 27 va fluidifier les conversations RCS entre les utilisateurs Android et iPhone en prenant en charge les réponses intégrées. De quoi suivre plus facilement une conversation au long cours.

item.title: OpenAI's new Daybreak⁠ initiative will help open-source projects fend off bugs
item.description: OpenAI has launched Patch the Planet, a new initiative part of its Daybreak cybersecurity program.

item.title: Face à la canicule, le Prime Day brade les meilleurs ventilateurs pour sauver votre été
item.description: La canicule est là, mais les prix, eux, sont en baisse. En pleine vague de chaleur, Amazon lance son Prime Day et brade une large sélection de ventilateurs pour vous aider à garder votre logement au frais. On vous a déniché les bons plans incontournables pour affronter l'été au meilleur prix.

item.title: Le Prime Day d’Amazon commence enfin ! Voici les meilleures offres en DIRECT
item.description: Amazon lance officiellement son Prime Day dès aujourd'hui et jusqu'à vendredi. Les offres sont nombreuses, mais nous faisons le tri en temps réel pour vous proposer uniquement les plus intéressantes.

item.title: Avec ses 36 grammes, la Corsair Sabre v2 Pro voit son prix s’écrouler de 40 € sur Amazon [Sponso]
item.description: Destinée aux joueurs en quête d'une vitesse d'exécution irréprochable, l'ultra-légère Corsair Sabre v2 Pro voit son prix fondre sur Amazon. Habituellement proposée à 109,99 euros, cette référence s'affiche actuellement à seulement 69,99 euros. De plus, les membres Prime peuvent bénéficier d'une offre promotionnelle supplémentaire à durée limitée.

item.title: ‘Ask people if they want to be cared for by a robot, and most say no': People are warming up to robots at work - but they don't want them in hospitals or schools
item.description: Public support for workplace robots is growing, but confidence and trust remain low for roles requiring empathy and human caregiving.

item.title: Portugal vs Ouzbékistan : à quelle heure et sur quelle chaîne regarder le match du groupe K ?
item.description: Le Portugal affronte l'Ouzbékistan ce mardi 23 juin 2026 dans le groupe K de la Coupe du monde 2026. Le match est diffusé gratuitement sur M6, et pour tout voir sans exception, beIN Sports reste la solution tout-en-un.

item.title: Best Prime Day Vacuum Deals (2026): Shark, Dyson, Bissell
item.description: Move over, spring cleaning. These vacuum deals will give your home the cleanest summer yet thanks to Amazon Prime Day.

item.title: Elegoo Centauri Carbon 2 Combo : l’imprimante 3D multicolore s’offre un look emoji
item.description: ELEGOO habille son imprimante 3D à succès aux couleurs de la marque emoji : la Centauri Carbon 2 Combo passe au blanc argent avec des smileys partout, pour 479 € au lieu de 439 €. La machine, elle, ne change pas.

item.title: La PS6 au prix de la Steam Machine ? « Inimaginable » pour l’ancien patron de PlayStation
item.description: Le prix de la Steam Machine au-dessus de 1 000 euros fait craindre pour les prix des futures consoles PlayStation et Xbox. Du côté de Sony, l'ancien patron de PlayStation Shuhei Yoshida n'imagine pas une PS6 à plus de 1 000 euros.

item.title: 3 People Have Gotten Cancer-Detecting Implants in Their Brains
item.description: Coherence Neuro has started testing a brain-computer interface that could one day use electrical stimulation to prevent tumors from growing.

item.title: 42 ways you should be using AI right now
item.description: Agentic AI can make life—and work—easier. You know this. But are you doing anything about it? Time to get off the sidelines and into the game. Speaking at Cisco’s AI Summit in February, Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang argued that concern over hypercapable AI replacing human knowledge workers en masse was overblown. “You’re not going to lose your job to AI,” he declared. “You’re going to lose your job to someone who uses AI.” You could regard this prospect as ominous in itself. Or you could seize the opportunity to become that “someone who uses AI.” These days, that doesn’t just mean querying a chatbot...

item.title: Pour le Prime Day Amazon fait -100 € sur ces écouteurs sans-fil Beats pour sportifs avec le même capteur FC qu’une Apple Watch
item.description: Si vous faites du sport à haut niveau et que vous aimez avoir une bonne playlist pour vous motiver, les Beats Powerbeats Pro 2 sont en promo à 199 euros au lieu de 299 euros pour le Prime Day.

item.title: Les tests de la Steam Machine sont là : une bien belle boîte, mais bien trop chère
item.description: Les premiers tests de la Steam Machine sont tombés, et le verdict est sans appel. Les médias et créateurs adorent la console et son design mais ne peuvent pas digérer le prix.

item.title: Prime Day Means Apple Deals on iPad, iPhone Cases, MagSafe Accessories, and More
item.description: Apple deals abound for Amazon Prime Day. We've rounded up the best deals on Apple Watches, iPhones, MacBooks, iPads, and accessories.

item.title: Cooling just became the most strategic choice in AI infrastructure
item.description: As AI power demands surge, cooling emerges as infrastructure’s defining competitive advantage.

item.title: Prime Day Mushroom Coffee Deals: Start Here (2026)
item.description: Not all mushroom coffees taste like dirt. These are the on-sale blends WIRED tried and actually recommends.

item.title: The 6 Best Prime Day TV Deals Plus Streaming Devices (2026)
item.description: These are the hottest Prime Day deals on our favorite TVs and streaming devices.

item.title: Prime Day has kicked off with big TV deals — score the Toshiba 85-inch Z670R Series Mini-LED TV for $500 off
item.description: The Toshiba 85-inch Mini-LED Smart Fire TV is on sale at Amazon for $1,199.99, down from $1,699.99 as of June 23. That's a $500 discount on the new 2026 model.

item.title: The Best Amazon Prime Day Deals Under $30 in 2026
item.description: Everything is expensive. Treat yourself to one of these WIRED-tested and -approved Prime Day picks under $30.

item.title: Best Prime Day Kindle Deals (2026): Paperwhite, Colorsoft, Kids
item.description: There’s no better time to get a Kindle than during Amazon's own sale event.

item.title: The Jackery Explorer 1000 v2 is on sale for Prime Day — buy this power station for under $400
item.description: Find the best portable power station deal. Save 50% on the Jackery Explorer 1000 v2 at Amazon.

item.title: I've used Sony's WH-1000XM6 headphones every day since they came out a year ago — here's why they're my favorite headphones, even over Bose, AirPods and Sony’s fancier Collexion
item.description: One year on, Sony’s XM6 are still king of the noise-cancelling headphones game — here’s why I’d pick them over the likes of Bose’s QuietComfort Ultra and Apple’s AirPods Max 2.

item.title: Satya Nadella is asking the right AI question
item.description: Microsoft’s CEO argues that the future of enterprise AI is not the model, it’s the learning loop. The most important idea in AI right now may not be coming from a research paper, a model release, or a benchmark. It may be coming from a short essay published by Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella.

item.title: I Found the Very Best Prime Day Laptop Deals onMacBooks and More (2026)
item.description: From MacBooks to gaming laptops, these are the very best deals on some of my very favorite laptops for Amazon Prime Day.

item.title: Don't fall victim to rip-off AI pricing when upgrading your PS5 storage — this 5TB HDD is now less than one third of the price of a 4TB SSD
item.description: SSD prices have exploded, so I'd recommend this far cheaper PS5 HDD if you want to upgrade your console storage.

item.title: The Anker Solix C2000 portable power station is better than half off — save $800 on Prime Day
item.description: Find the best power station deal at Amazon. Save 47% on the Anker Solix C2000 at Amazon.

item.title: The MacBook Air M5 is down to under $950 for Prime Day — should you wait for something better?
item.description: Find the best MacBook Air deal. Save 14% on the 13-inch 2026 MacBook Air M5 at Amazon.

item.title: Fuite Apple et Tesla : des données confidentielles ont été volées à un sous-traitant
item.description: Tata Electronics, un sous-traitant indien chargé d'assembler des iPhone pour Apple et de fabriquer des pièces pour Tesla, a été victime d'une cyberattaque. Le groupe criminel World Leaks a publié sur le dark web une archive de 630 gigaoctets contenant plus de 200 000 fichiers, dont des documents confidentiels appartenant aux deux géants américains.

item.title: The 11-inch Apple iPad has gone on sale for Prime Day — act fast to save $50
item.description: Find the best Apple iPad at Amazon. Save 14% on the Apple iPad 11-inch (A16) at Amazon.

item.title: Best Prime Day Tech Deals (2026): Phones, Watches, and More
item.description: Don't pay full price—snag one of these tasty Prime Day tech deals on some of our favorite WIRED-tested gadgets.

item.title: The ultimate Prime Day Apple deals guide: Were tracking prices on AirPods, iPads, and MacBooks
item.description: The best early Prime Day Apple deals include record lows on AirPods Pro 3 and M5 MacBook Air. Wait to add any other gadgets to your cart.

item.title: The Best Amazon Prime Day Deals Under $100 in 2026
item.description: Times are hard in 2026. These Amazon Prime Day deals under $100 on earbuds, Kindles, and more make life just a little bit easier.

item.title: Best Prime Day Deals We’d Spend Our Own Money On (2026)
item.description: We've gone from A to Z to find Amazon's best Prime Day deals on the gear worth owning.

item.title: Why enterprise AI is forcing a rethink in cost control
item.description: Enterprise AI adoption is exposing major gaps in cost forecasting, governance and value measurement.

item.title: Amazon Prime Day is here: We found 50+ deals on Apple, Sony, and Lego favorites
item.description: Another Amazon mega sale starts June 23. Shop the best Prime Day deals on Sony headphones, Samsung TVs, Kindles, and Apple AirPods.

item.title: ‘The Big Short’ investor issues a dire warning about Nvidia. Here’s why he believes an ‘aggressive fall’ is coming, and how businesses can avoid the same fate
item.description: Michael Burry is continuing his campaign against the AI chipmaker giant. Michael Burry, the investor whose controversial bet against the housing market was made famous in The Big Short, is continuing his campaign against another, perhaps even frothier target: Nvidia. Here’s why entrepreneurs outside the AI sector should still be taking note.

item.title: Here are some of the best Samsung deals available as Amazon Prime Day 2026 kicks off
item.description: As of June 17, there are already quite a few early Prime Day Samsung deals to shop at Amazon. Here are some of our favorites worth checking out before the event begins.

item.title: The best tablet deals on Prime Day: Score deals on iPads and Galaxy Tabs
item.description: Ahead of Prime Day, we're tracking deals on tablets. Right now save big on OnePlus, Samsung, and Apple tablets.

item.title: Upgrade your tech with the best Prime Day Amazon Fire Tablet deals
item.description: As of June 10, here are some of the best early Prime Day Amazon Fire Tablet deals.

item.title: The best fitness tracker deals on Prime Day: Fitbit and Garmin down to record-low prices
item.description: Ahead of Prime Day, get fitness trackers for their lowest price ever. Save up to $500 on Garmin, Fitbit, and Apple.

item.title: Shop the best Nintendo Switch deals for Prime Day 2026
item.description: As of June 16, shop the best early Prime Day Nintendo Switch deals at Amazon.

item.title: The best Prime Day drone deals: Score best-ever deals on DJI and Holy Stone
item.description: Save up to 29% on DJI and Holy Stone drones before Amazon Prime Day.

item.title: 65-inch TVs on sale for Prime Day: 2026 mini LED TVs at record-low prices and free gifts
item.description: There are several good sales on 65-inch TVs ahead of Prime Day. Save up to 40% on new TCL and Hisense TVs, plus the Amazon Ember Artline.

item.title: 20+ trading card deals to shop on Prime Day — save on Pokémon TCG, Magic, One Piece, and more
item.description: Shop the 20 best early Prime Day trading card deals at Amazon, including Pokémon TCG, Magic: The Gathering, One Piece, and KPop Demon Hunters.

item.title: The best gaming deals Id buy on Prime Day — Switch 2 bundles and Asus gaming laptops on sale
item.description: Save 30% on an Asus gaming laptop and 42% on a Samsung gaming monitor before Prime Day.

item.title: 20+ book deals Im sending to the group chat for Prime Day
item.description: Shop the best book deals at Amazon ahead of Prime Day, including hardcovers, paperbacks, and Kindle versions up to 50% off.
